author: OC Nodes
msg: Locally run just a few (under 10) between S8 and moto G. About another 20 run by a partner in Canada.. but most of the others were done by partners in third world countries who are running 5 each at one location with their friends and families with their own separate arrangements and they are getting high ULO splits to make it worthwhile their time, effort and electric. With the understanding that I have the option to raise my UNO share with every 6 month Renewal if rewards are significantly higher.
